name: pr-review
description: Generic, plugin-based PR review for GitHub and Azure DevOps (single-plugin marketplace; works on Copilot CLI and Claude Code)

plugins.name: pr-review
plugins.description: Generic, plugin-based PR review for GitHub and Azure DevOps. Orchestrates parallel reviewer agents in a single session (Copilot CLI or Claude Code), with optional Codex second opinion and stack/business-rule skills.
